steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes scholars were skeptical about the helmets being Viking gear, then says their findings ______ scholars’ skepticism, followed by the fact that the helmets date to the Nordic Bronze Age, centuries before the Vikings existed.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the signal
steps.content:
Justify means to show or prove to be right or reasonable; the radiocarbon dates proving the helmets are older than the Vikings give scholars grounds for their doubt, so the findings justify their skepticism.
Anticipate means to expect beforehand, inspect means to examine closely, and reveal means to make known; none of these convey the idea of supporting a doubt.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
